text: I feel a sense of curiosity and reflection in this environment, surrounded by symbols of research and innovation. The controlled lighting, fire safety equipment, and modern design evoke an atmosphere of cautious optimism, balanced between safety and progress. In the R&D space, where human understanding meets intelligent machines, I am aware of my own desire to grasp the intertwining of technology and human experience. Here, I feel both inspired and contemplative, eager to learn yet aware of the distance between knowledge and wisdom.
